title: Loadouts
description: Allows players to create own loadouts, which they will get on respawn.
body:
# Loadouts

Players can save their all inventory, and then get it on respawn.

Will come in handy if you want to have deathmatch with your friends.

## Permissions:

**loadout.command**: Main permission for loadout command.

**loadout.command.activate**: Activates state of plugin(getting players loadout when they die)

## Commands

**/loadout:** Main command, can be executed only with subcommands below

**activate <true or false>**: Changes state of plugin(getting player loadout when they die)

**view <name>** Open inventory, where you can look at loadout with given name.

**remove <name>**: Removes loadout with given name

**save <name>**: Saves your inventory to loadout. If loadout with given name already exists, will update this loadout

**set <name>**: Sets this loadout to active. On death you will get this loadout.

## Credits

Created with Triumph CMD library, which you can find at this repo: https://github.com/TriumphTeam/triumph-cmds
